title: Subagent Helper: migrate deep reflect to workflow helper

reviewerA.focus: deep reflect lifecycle correctness, session cleanup, CODE_EVIDENCE

reviewerB.focus: OpenClaw runtime semantics, sessionKey/runId attribution, cross-repo assumptions

escalationReviewer.focus: macro: business flow, data flow, architecture, OpenClaw compatibility

context: Use PD-only changes; do not modify /home/csuzngjh/code/openclaw.
PR2 scope: empathy observer + deep-reflect ONLY. Diagnostician/Nocturnal NOT migrated in this PR.
DeepReflect currently has sessionKey/runId semantic confusion and must be resolved in this PR.
Treat deep reflect as plugin-owned runtime_direct only. Do not mix registry_backed semantics into the main model.
subagent_ended may be used only as fallback, observation, or UNPROVEN signal. It is NOT the primary completion contract.
If runtime subagent availability is unproven for a surface, the design must degrade instead of forcing sidecar execution.

investigate: Audit deep reflect's current path as plugin-owned runtime_direct only.
Identify sessionKey vs runId confusion: which is which, where used, what the correct mapping is.
Audit lifecycle hooks and classify each as primary, fallback, observation, or UNPROVEN.
Document cleanup/timeout paths, sidecar availability assumptions, and degrade boundaries.
architecture-cut: Decide whether deep reflect can use helper on the audited surfaces or must degrade on specific surfaces.
Define the DeepReflect workflow interface around the single main path: run -> waitForRun(runId) -> getSessionMessages(sessionKey) -> finalizeOnce.
Resolve sessionKey/runId confusion: document correct attribution chain.
global_reviewer must explicitly answer: Is migration architecturally sound? Session chain correctly attributed? Are sidecar boundaries explicit?
patch-plan: Design DeepReflect workflow spec with lifecycle hooks treated as optional observation, not the primary completion contract.
Plan checkpoint artifact schema: session_key, run_id, checkpoint_timestamp, reflect_payload, persistence_confirmed.
Plan shadow-run period to compare old vs new behavior and workflow debug summaries.
Define rollback and degrade behavior for runtime-unavailable surfaces.
implement-pass-1: Implement DeepReflect helper integration with RuntimeDirectDriver.
Fix sessionKey/runId attribution: sessionKey = child session identity, runId = agent run identity.
Keep lifecycle hooks as optional observation only; do not make them required for finalize.
Run shadow mode alongside existing deep reflect path only on surfaces explicitly marked sidecar_allowed.
implement-pass-2: Validate shadow-run comparison: new path produces equivalent reflect payloads.
Do not expand scope beyond DeepReflect integration and its RuntimeDirectDriver.
verify: Verify lifecycle observations via deep-reflect-checkpoint.json artifacts without requiring them for primary completion.
Confirm merge gate: local SHA == remote/feat/subagent-helper-deep-reflect SHA.
global_reviewer must confirm: OpenClaw assumptions verified? Session chain correctly closed? Degrade boundaries explicit?
Confirm sessionKey/runId confusion resolved, no double-finalize.
